automationEvents.tweetText:
if name == "sourabh.gurwani":
  return False

And every time a user registers, you start a Codex automation job to add a new if clause (very quickly).

If you want to optimize you can use GPT-5.3-Spark, which is faster.

If you want to optimize further, ask Codex how to implement an index.
